evidence: "Nice, light drama & I like British movies."
"If you're an ancient Egypt fan, this is a terrific choice."
"The script is sung instead of spoken. It sounds like the actors are having to 'sing' their lines without a score!"
"The movie seemed more of a Douglas history than an entertaining movie."
"This one is a longer production, giving more character development."
"The film takes you across the gorgeous landscape & the inside tour is beautiful."
"The Blu-ray picture is great as are the actors and cinematography."
"The special effects look more authentic, also."
"I have all the collections so far & hope they keep 'em coming!"
"You feel like the tour has taken you into parts of the estate that the usual visitor would have missed."
"The film takes you across the gorgeous landscape & the inside tour is beautiful."
"Helped me understand more clearly the situation over there."
"I liked it very much. You see how much work & money it costs the families to maintain their ancestral homes."

summary: The user enjoys light dramas and educational documentaries, particularly those with strong production quality. They prefer slower-paced narratives that provide character development and immersive experiences, though they show mixed feelings towards emotional engagement and brand loyalty.
